prompts.description: Fix cost: 0 validation bug in fetchIngredientViaClaude
prompts.prompt:
In components/onboarding.tsx, make exactly two changes inside the fetchIngredientViaClaude function:

1. Find this exact line:
   `if (!data.name || !data.category || !data.cost) throw new Error("Invalid response")`
   Replace it with:
   `if (typeof data.name !== "string" || !data.name.trim() || typeof data.category !== "string" || !data.category.trim()) throw new Error("Invalid response")`

2. Find this exact line inside the ingredientCatalog.push block:
   `cost: data.cost,`
   Replace it with:
   `cost: Number(data.cost) || 0,`

Do NOT change any other line in the file. Do NOT modify app/api/claude-nutrition/route.ts or any other file.

Verify: npm run build passes with no TypeScript errors.
